untranslatable_reason: Rectangle pattern requires multi-bar horizontal consolidation detection and pre-formation trend analysis not directly expressible via single-bar indicator conditions. Specifically: (1) Rectangle formation identification requires sustained price oscillation between two levels over multiple bars; (2) Pre-formation rise/drop movement evaluation requires multi-bar trend confirmation; (3) Partial rise/decline conditions during formation require tracking price oscillation patterns within the rectangle bounds; (4) The conditional logic ('83% downward breakout after partial rise') requires pattern state memory across multiple bars. Standard indicators cannot encode the multi-bar memory and pattern topology needed. Recommend: custom pattern recognition function or higher-level composite indicator.
